2188290.name: RPGScenery - Giant War Elephant
2188290.description:
Imagine a giant elephant. Now imagine five times that size. That's what you see in front of you. A mountain-sized monster towering over the trees, as it moves firmly, knocks down trees and causes a minor earthquake with every step it takes. It carries a small wooden fort on its back as if it doesn't tickle. Who lives in it? Maybe merchants, robbers, or slave traders? There's only one way to find out ...

This DLC contains 4 battlemaps to help you to bring your TTRPG session to the next level
